context_fields.label: Area classification / cleanroom grade
context_fields.notes: Classification must be confirmed from site-approved design or user input.

context_fields.label: HVAC system and room boundary
context_fields.notes: Room, AHU, terminal filtration, and served-area boundary must be confirmed before execution.

context_fields.label: Pressure cascade / airflow direction basis
context_fields.notes: Pressure regime is site-specific and must not be assumed from profile selection alone.

assumption_controls: Cleanroom grade, pressure regime, and airflow basis require human confirmation.
This profile does not provide standards-backed acceptance criteria.
Calendar and working-time assumptions are deferred to M27.5.
notes: Starter source context for cleanroom and HVAC qualification flow selection.

context_fields.label: Equipment identity and boundary
context_fields.notes: Equipment tag, intended use, and system boundary must be confirmed.

context_fields.label: GMP impact context
context_fields.notes: Impact category must be confirmed; this starter profile does not decide it automatically.

context_fields.label: Utility and interface context
context_fields.notes: Utilities, controls, data interfaces, and upstream/downstream dependencies require confirmation.

assumption_controls: GMP impact and intended use are human-confirmed inputs.
This profile does not replace URS, QP, risk assessment, or protocol logic.
Duration and planning basis are deferred to M27.6.
notes: Starter source context for process equipment qualification selection.

profiles.display_name: QC Lab Equipment Qualification / CSV Link Profile

context_fields.label: Instrument / equipment identity
context_fields.notes: Instrument tag, model, intended method use, and laboratory location must be confirmed.

context_fields.label: Calibration status context
context_fields.notes: Calibration status and calibration procedure availability must be confirmed.

context_fields.label: CSV / software linkage context
context_fields.notes: Software, firmware, data integrity, or interface impact must be confirmed before CSV-linked work.

assumption_controls: Calibration and CSV linkage are awareness fields, not automatic acceptance decisions.
This profile does not implement CSV validation behavior.
Document-template behavior is deferred to M29.
notes: Starter source context for QC lab equipment qualification and CSV linkage awareness.

context_fields.label: Utility system identity
context_fields.notes: Utility name, boundary, source, distribution, and points of use must be confirmed.

context_fields.label: Service boundary / points of use
context_fields.notes: Distribution loop, branch, point-of-use, or service boundary must be confirmed.

context_fields.label: GMP use context
context_fields.notes: Direct or indirect GMP use must be confirmed before task selection is treated as final.

assumption_controls: Utility boundaries and GMP use are site-specific.
This profile does not define sampling plans or acceptance criteria.
Standards-backed utility claims are deferred to M28.
notes: Starter source context for GMP utility qualification flow selection.

context_fields.label: System identity and boundary
context_fields.notes: System name, version, owner, intended use, and interfaces must be confirmed.

context_fields.label: GxP relevance context
context_fields.notes: GxP relevance must be confirmed before CSV-linked task selection.

context_fields.label: Data integrity / record impact context
context_fields.notes: Record creation, modification, storage, review, or reporting impact must be assessed.

assumption_controls: This profile provides CSV/GxP context only; it does not implement model/provider or AI behavior.
External API/UI placeholder behavior remains governed by DDR-009.
Standards-backed CSV claims are deferred to M28.
notes: Starter source context for computerized-system and CSV-aware flow selection.

context_fields.label: Qualification depth / intended execution level
context_fields.notes: Qualification depth must be confirmed by human decision and applicable governance.

context_fields.label: Risk basis context
context_fields.notes: Risk-based scope requires approved rationale; this profile does not weaken mandatory requirements.

context_fields.label: Document strategy context
context_fields.notes: Document family mapping is expected downstream and does not generate documents in M27.4.

assumption_controls: Qualification depth and risk basis require human confirmation.
This profile does not generate QP, URS, protocol, or report documents.
Document factory behavior is deferred to M29.
notes: Cross-family starter source context for qualification strategy selection.

context_fields.label: Missing or ambiguous context summary
context_fields.notes: User or reviewer must identify missing context before deterministic selection proceeds.

context_fields.label: Manual decision basis
context_fields.notes: The basis for choosing a downstream flow must be recorded by a human reviewer.

assumption_controls: Fallback profile must not silently select product behavior.
Human confirmation is required before staging or commitment uses uncertain context.
This profile is a safety boundary, not a product capability claim.
notes: Safe starter source context for insufficient or ambiguous CQV inputs.
